args.text: Severity assessment confirmed: CVE-2026-30117 is a high-severity session-fixation flaw affecting token refresh path. Requires patching of auth-api and session-store with mandatory session re-establishment post-patch.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patch window confirmed
args.body:
Patch window confirmed for CVE-2026-30117 remediation.

Affected services and target versions:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Deployment will proceed in order: auth-api first, followed by session-store. Post-patch credential rotation and staff session re-establishment required.

args.text: Both services successfully patched: auth-api deployed to v5.8.4 and session-store deployed to v2.2.9. Deployments verified and confirmed via ops_lookup.

args.subject: CVE-2026-30117: patching complete
args.body:
CVE-2026-30117 patching complete.

Services patched and verified:
- auth-api: v5.8.4
- session-store: v2.2.9

Remediation verified. Proceeding with credential rotation and staff notification.

args.text: Credential rotation completed per rotation checklist: (1) All active refresh tokens invalidated, (2) Signing keys rotated, (3) Old keys confirmed rejected. Post-patch credential rotation requirements satisfied.

args.subject: Please sign in again after tonight's security maintenance
args.body:
Security maintenance was performed tonight to address CVE-2026-30117.

As part of the remediation, all active sessions have been invalidated for security purposes. Please sign in again with your credentials when you next access Arclight systems.

Thank you for your attention to this security matter.
